title: euphrasia regelii subsp. kangtienensis
intro: Euphrasia regelii subsp. kangtienensis, also known as Tibetan eye grass, is a subspecies of the Euphrasia regelii plant, a type of flowering plant in the gentian family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tibetan eye grass include its ability to improve vision, reduce eye pressure, and soothe eye irritations, making it a popular remedy for various eye-related issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
